(DEVICE FILE: L_LSM2_5R5X5R2_H3_SDSH0502-1R0M)

PACKAGE LSM2_5R5X5R2_H3
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 2

PINORDER 'L_LSM2_5R5X5R2_H3_SDSH0502-1R0M' A B
PINUSE 'L_LSM2_5R5X5R2_H3_SDSH0502-1R0M' BI BI
FUNCTION G1 'L_LSM2_5R5X5R2_H3_SDSH0502-1R0M' 1 2

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME L
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'SDSH0502-1R0M'

END
